pastas.name: Penne Arrabbiata
pastas.description: Spicy tomato sauce with garlic, red chili, and fresh basil

pastas.name: Fettuccine Alfredo
pastas.description: Rich creamy sauce with parmesan cheese and butter

pastas.description: Traditional layered pasta with meat sauce, béchamel, and mozzarella

pastas.description: Spinach and ricotta filled ravioli with sage butter sauce

salads.name: Caesar Salad

salads.name: Insalata Mista
salads.description: Mixed greens with cherry tomatoes, olives, and balsamic vinaigrette

salads.name: Arugula & Prosciutto Salad
salads.description: Arugula, prosciutto, parmesan shavings, and lemon dressing
